name: Alexander Karp
background: Dr. Karp is one of our co-founders and has served as our Chief Executive Officer since 2004 and as a member of our Board since 2003. Dr. Karp holds a B.A. from Haverford College, a J.D. from Stanford University, and a Ph.D. from Goethe University in Frankfurt, Germany.

company_affiliations.name: Palantir Technologies Inc.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Co-founder, Chief Executive Officer, and Director
